illustrations.prompt: Maya at her bedroom workshop. Cluttered wooden workbench with circuit boards, tools, wires. Warm golden desk lamp lighting. Notebooks and blueprints scattered. Cozy creative inventor den.
Dark basement corridor with rough concrete walls and exposed pipes overhead. Single flashlight beam cutting through dust and cobwebs. Eerie mysterious atmosphere. No people.
Maya discovering abandoned underground lab. Dusty workbenches with old equipment. Grey crates with faded labels. Cobwebs. Flashlight piercing darkness. Forgotten secrets.
Daadi in warm kitchen making samosas. Lace curtains with sunlight. Steam from stove. Colorful spice jars. Cozy family warmth.
Maya sleeping in dark bedroom. Moonlight through window. Blip on bedside table with dim glow. Quiet peaceful night.
Maya at dark desk. Blip flickering to life with cyan glow on faces. Discovery wonder moment.
Blip on chaotic street. Traffic lights flashing. Drone spiraling. Sprinklers spraying. Maya watching from window. Pandemonium.
Leo at dim library. Tall bookshelves. Reading table with books. Tablet with green code reflected in glasses. Focused quiet atmosphere.
Zara on street photographing glitch effects. Hair twists and yellow bag. Artist capturing impossible scene. Warm golden light.
Sam vaulting over park bench. Red gloves and LED sneakers. Impish grin. Dynamic action. Energetic bright mood.
Maya, Leo, Zara, Sam and Blip in meeting room around table. Whiteboard with diagrams. Excited discussion. Warm friendly first meeting.
Maya, Leo, Zara, Sam and Blip crammed in dark closet hiding. Cleaning supplies. Light under door. Blip glowing. Tense hushed atmosphere.
Empty school hallway with lockers. Red emergency lights. Doors slamming. No students. Panicked lockdown.
Monitor with glitchy Gridlord face. Static and code. Purple and green distortion. Crown icon. Eerie digital presence.
Leo tracing symbols on tablet at library table. Lines connecting patterns. Cipher symbols. Focused analytical. Blue glow.
Zara sketching symbols at art corner. Easels around. Marker stains. Creative discovery. Bright colors.
Maya, Leo, Zara and Sam in living room circle. Gadgets and notebooks. Building device from wire and magnets. Blip floating above. Teamwork.
Maya, Leo, Zara and Sam at dark tunnel entrance behind basement wall. Flashlight into darkness. Dusty narrow space with cables.
Underground lab. Maya, Leo, Zara and Sam celebrating. Device connected to terminal. Blip happy. Triumphant joyful. Warm lighting.
Blip close up showing loading icon. Flickering orange emoji. Buffering symbol. Comedic. Dark background.
Maya, Leo, Zara and Sam on bedroom floor at midnight. Samosas between them. Blip curious. Moonlight. Cozy secret feast.
Daadi in sunny kitchen making parathas. Golden morning light. Steam and warmth. Peaceful domestic morning.
Maya, Leo, Zara and Sam on park bench sharing breakfast. Blip hovering. Dappled light. Peaceful outdoor morning. Warm tones.
Maya, Leo, Zara and Sam in narrow underground tunnel. Brick walls with cables. Flashlights. Distant glow. Crown symbol. Adventurous.
Server room. Blip connected to terminal. Monitor with red dots spreading. Maya watching. Tension. Blue glow.
Sam at traffic light control box. Attaching device. Sparks. Red gloves. Determined action. Electric sparks.
Leo at library. Tablet with green code cascading. Reading glasses. Code stabilizing. Cool green glow.
Zara in park with painting on easel. Adding glitch overlays with stylus. Flowers and digital art merging.
Maya at water sprinklers with makeshift valve. Water spraying everywhere. Rainbows. Action and chaos.
Lab monitor with red dots spreading map. Crown icon glowing. Blip concerned. Ominous digital glow.
Server room. Blip connected via cable. Energy crackling. Maya watching. Data stream. Dramatic lighting.
Server room. Blip disconnecting. VERSION 1.0 happy on screen. Maya embracing Blip. Triumphant.
Underground lab with Maya, Leo, Zara and Sam. String lights. Workbench with monitors. Charging dock. Pegboard. Cozy secret base.
Lab wall with Blip blueprint schematics. Handwritten notes. Holographic projection. Leo studying. Discovery.
Cork board with photos and red string. Newspaper clippings. Logo hologram. Zara adding photo. Investigation.
Rooftop at sunset. Maya, Leo, Zara and Sam sitting on edge. Blip floating. Skyline glowing. Peaceful contemplative moment.
Maya on rooftop at dusk looking at skyline. Goggles around neck. Wind in ponytail. Heroic silhouette.
Blip floating in dark with expressions cycling. Spotlight. Character showcase. Clean minimal presentation.
Blip in shaft of light. Screen showing internal schematic. Holographic data. Tech spec style.
Blip on white background. Happy wink screen. Clean friendly presentation. Character intro.

strips.prompt: The story is set in Neonville, a vibrant modern city with warm climate, tree-lined streets with tall shady trees, cozy older apartment buildings made of red brick, a small neighborhood park with a wooden bench and flowering bushes, a public library with arched windows and stone steps, a community center with colorful painted murals on its walls, and the tall glass NexCorp tower visible in the distance where the skyline meets the horizon. Blip is a small cute white cube robot approximately 4 inches on each side, made of matte white plastic-like casing with slightly rounded edges and some scuff marks from being handled, with a glowing LED screen on its front face that displays simple emoji-style expressions in cyan teal color showing two round dot eyes and a curved smile line, a small flexible antenna on top that wiggles when it communicates, tiny hover thrusters on the bottom that keep it floating about 2 feet off the ground with a soft hum, a slight dirt smudge from being found in a basement, and a friendly childlike curious personality that shows through its ever-changing facial expressions. Leo is a 11-year-old Mexican-American boy coder with warm tan golden-brown skin, a compact stocky build with broad shoulders, black thick slightly grown-out fade haircut under a navy blue beanie with a small pixelated heart patch sewn on the side, very dark intense eyes with thick eyebrows, a serious focused expression, oversized gray hoodie with sleeves pulled over his hands and a tablet tucked in the front pocket, a dark t-shirt underneath, jeans with grass-stained knees at the grass stains from kneeling while working, sturdy double-knotted sneakers, and reading glasses hanging from a chain around his neck. Maya is a 11-year-old Indian girl inventor with warm brown skin, dark brown messy ponytail with escaped strands and a pencil stuck in it, safety goggles pushed up on her forehead, oversized olive green utility vest with many pockets full of wires and tools, a faded red rocket ship t-shirt underneath, cargo shorts, velcro sneakers with one untied lace, a modified digital watch with tiny antenna on her left wrist, a gap-toothed grin, lean wiry build, and a curious determined expression with wide dark brown eyes that sparkle when she discovers something new. Sam is a 10-year-old Japanese-Korean boy gamer with light-medium warm skin, a compact athletic muscular build as the shortest in the group, black spiky messy hair styled with gel on top and shaved close on the sides, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with a mischievous sparkle always looking for fun, a round face with a pointed chin, a missing bottom front baby tooth giving him an impish grin, bright red fingerless gaming gloves that go up to his wrists, a black t-shirt with PLAYER 1 printed on it, athletic shorts with side stripes, high-top sneakers with LED lights that flash in the soles, a gaming headset resting around his neck, knee pads with cartoon stickers on them, and boundless energy in every pose. Zara is an 12-year-old Nigerian-British girl artist with rich dark brown skin, a tall long-limbed graceful build, voluminous black natural hair in chunky twists with colorful thread woven through them, bright expressive dark brown eyes, high cheekbones, a wide warm smile with a gap in her front teeth, small 3D-printed stud earrings, a bright yellow crossbody bag covered in enamel pins and badges, an oversized denim jacket with patches and hand-drawn doodles on the sleeves, a colorful graphic art tee underneath, patterned leggings in bright colors, galaxy-painted sneakers, beaded bracelets on both wrists, and a stylus tucked behind her ear. Blip floats at eye level with the kids, its cyan LED screen changing expressions rapidly as it processes what is happening. Leo studies the data on his screen with narrowed eyes, his beanie slightly askew from running his hand through his hair. Maya points excitedly at her discovery, her gap-toothed grin spreading across her face as she explains what she found. Sam pumps his fist in triumph, full of youthful energy and enthusiasm that energizes the whole group. Zara observes everything with her trained eye, a warm smile on her face as she takes in the details others miss.
